title: World Rally Championship Series (2005)
summary: The World Rally Championship Series is a 2005 series of four cars with rally-themed tampos, replicating that of actual WRC cars that raced from 2003 through 2004. These were initially part of the Hot Wheels Racing series before being taken out and made their own standalone series....
